base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of char_select_nc — a ui from 1991 street fighter ii. New Challengers (SSF2) char-select — 16 slots (4 new challengers). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
